_comment: Confirmed-working versions. Run scripts/check-provider-updates.sh to check for updates.

ccusage.schema_notes: daily --json: {daily: [{date, cost, inputTokens, outputTokens, modelBreakdowns: [{modelName, cost, inputTokens, outputTokens, cacheReadTokens, cacheCreationTokens}]}]}

codexbar.schema_notes: usage --json: [{provider, source, usage: {primary: {usedPercent, windowMinutes, resetsAt}, secondary: {...}}}]. Exits with code 3 when any provider has error but still outputs valid JSON for others. Hangs without TTY (issue #1329).
codexbar.workaround: Use `script -q /dev/null codexbar usage --json` on Mac to allocate pseudo-TTY

pystray.platform_notes: Mac: AppKit, Win: win32, Linux: AppIndicator3 (requires libayatana-appindicator3)
